title: UPSSSC Homeopathic Pharmacist Final Result 2026 for 397 Post
description: UPSSSC Homeopathic Pharmacist Recruitment 2024: Final Result for 397 Post Post Update Date: 25-06-2026 Short Description: UPSSSC Homeopathic Pharmacist Final Result 2024: Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission has announced recruitment for 397 Posts of UPSSSC Homeopathic Pharmacist. Candidates who want to apply online can apply from the link given on Rojgar Result. UPSSSC Homeopathic Pharmacist Online Form 2024 can be filled from 20 June 2024 to 19 July 2024. .
